arts.ttl: Barcelona poised to sign staggering €1.7bn Nike kit deal
arts.sum: Barcelona and Nike have been in partnership since 2000.

arts.ttl: Barcelona return to transfer normality not assured despite impending Nike agreement
arts.sum: On Friday, it was reported that Barcelona are set to finally complete their new sponsorship agreement with Nike, which has been in the pipeline for almost the entirety of 2024. This will also allow them to come closer to making their return to La Liga’s 1:1 rule, although rather surprisingly, it won’t take them all […] The post Barcelona return to transfer normality not assured despite impending Nike agreement appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Man United on the table as Real Madrid and Barcelona join race for 24-year-old speedster
arts.sum: Manchester United have been linked with a move for the Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies. According to journalist Christian Falk, Manchester United are very much on the table when it comes to the race for the Canadian international defender. They will face competition from Real Madrid and Barcelona as well. arts.ttl: Revealed: Official Kopa Trophy voting shows Marco van Basten picked two Premier League youngsters in his top 3... and the former winner who DIDN'T put Lamine Yamal as No 1
arts.sum: Former winners of the Ballon d'Or made their picks for the Kopa Trophy, an award for U21 players, and one three-time winner chose two Manchester United youngsters in his top three.

arts.ttl: Barca scout reveals why he didn’t want to sign Hazard
arts.sum: The club took a check on the Belgian while he was playing in France with Lille, but Bojan has told Cadena Ser why he wasn’t keen on the forward who went on to play for Chelsea and Real Madrid. “I went to see the next match after three days in Lille, against Angers.

arts.ttl: Unexpected Flick favourite set for new Barcelona contract
arts.sum: After watching Martinez in pre-season, Flick was convinced that the former Athletic Club defender was the man to replace the injured Ronald Araujo rather than former Man City star Eric Garcia, who had impressed on loan at Girona last term. Unexpected Flick favourite set for new Barcelona contract
